name: Bellevue Gold Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5200, stop A$1.1484, target A$1.7300 (0.57:1) — then trail it.
